title: How I can help – Luke Myer MP for Middlesbrough South and East Cleveland

text_excerpt: How I can help – Luke Myer MP for Middlesbrough South and East Cleveland Who I am What I do How I can help Surgeries News South Middlesbrough Guisborough East Cleveland How I can help If you are a local resident and have any local issues that I can help with, please get in touch. My team and I will pick it up and get back in touch as soon as we are able to. Looking to find out my view on a national policy issue? You can find my response to some of the most popular questions I get here. Policy issues Contact form First Name * Surname * First 4/5 digits of postcode * TS3 0 TS3 0 TS3 7 TS3 8 TS4 2 TS4 3 TS7 0 TS7 8 TS7 9 TS8 0 TS8 8 TS8 9 TS9 5 TS9 6 TS9 7 TS11 8 TS12 1 TS12 2 TS12 3 TS12 9 TS13 4 TS13 5 TS14 6 TS14 7 TS14 8 TS14 9 TS17 9 If the beginning of your postcode is not shown as an option, you will be a resident in another constituency. You can find your MP here: https://shorturl.at/N2aFX Street Address * City Full postcode * Email Address * Phone Number Message * Please include include key info and reference numbers to help following up on your case. Your national insurance number for tax queries or a Crime Reference Number for police enquiries. 0 / 1000 Send Message MPs are here to help, but they can’t help with everything. This House of Commons guidance explains what an MP can help with, and what should be raised with your local councillor or other services. Facebook Instagram Link YouTube Mail Privacy Policy Behaviour Policy Promoted by Luke Myer, 28B Chaloner St, Guisborough, TS14 6QD
